/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/db/mysql_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/db/mysql_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/mailServer/server_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/thread_pool/boost_thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/thread_pool/io_thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/src/mail_system/back/mailServer/smtps/smtps_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smtpsServer.dir/test/smtps_test.cpp.o -o /Users/zhuhongrui/Desktop/code/c++/project/mail-system/v6/test/smtpsServer   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_system.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib -lmysqlclient /opt/homebrew/lib/libspdlog.1.15.3.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.0/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.11.2.0.dylib
